entries.title: JPYC raises $12m Series B as mainstream investors back yen stablecoin
entries.snippet: Japanese yen stablecoin issuer JPYC has completed the first close of its Series B round, raising ¥1.78 billion (around $12 million) led by Asteria Corporation, a Japanese IT solutions provider. The fundraise signals a broadening of interest beyond the crypto sector, with most backers drawn from corp
entries.tweet_text:
JPYC closes $12M Series B led by Asteria Corporation, signaling mainstream corporate backing for yen stablecoin adoption in Japan.

Corporate capital entering stablecoin infrastructure marks a critical shift toward institutional legitimacy in Asia's largest economy.

entries.tweet_text: As regulatory pressure mounts on disaster relief channels, @InCommPayments and SKUx are routing humanitarian aid through blockchain infrastructure—a shift that could reshape how aid reaches emerging markets amid tighter scrutiny.
